issues.detail: The instructions do not cover error handling or edge cases such as missing user input.
The skill file contains verbose guidelines and anti-patterns that add padding beyond core instructions.
Only a brief description of tone and anti-patterns is provided, lacking concrete example outputs.

scenarios.name: Refine a vague Slack AI summarizer idea
scenarios.rationale: Baseline jumps straight to a tech stack with no sharpening questions or trade-offs; treatment runs the three-phase flow, asks who/success questions, uses named lenses, and produces a full one-pager including Not Doing and assumptions.

scenarios.name: Stress-test a developer newsletter plan
scenarios.rationale: Baseline gives generic risks without structured evaluation; treatment clusters 3 directions, stress-tests on painkiller/feasibility/differentiation, surfaces hidden assumptions per direction, and emits the full markdown one-pager template.
